title: nlohmann::json-like API surface
description: Developers using pjson should encounter a familiar API surface inspired by nlohmann::json, including value access by path, iteration over arrays and objects, type checking, and convenient construction of JSON structures.
rationale: nlohmann::json is the de facto standard C++ JSON library. Familiarity reduces learning curve and adoption friction.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: API supports JSON value types: null, boolean, integer, float, string, array, object
Values can be accessed by key (objects) and index (arrays)
Range-based for loops work for arrays and objects
